name: Pasta with White Truffles, Olive Oil, Parmesan, and Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dark Green Extra Virgin Olive Oil
3 tablespoons Dark Green Extra Virgin Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 8 quarts of lightly salted water to a boil.
2. Add the 3 tablespoons of olive oil to the boiling water.
3. Add the Angel Hair Pasta and cook until al dente (no more than two minutes).
4. Drain the pasta well.
5. Toss the drained pasta with the cup of olive oil, half the basil, salt, and black pepper to taste.
6. Mound the pasta in the center of each of 6 heated large serving plates.
7. Sprinkle the Parmesan Cheese over the pasta.
8. Using a truffle shaver or swivel-bladed vegetable peeler, shave the white truffles over each serving.
9. Garnish with the remaining basil.
